display.name: cert-manager Monitoring
display.description: Monitors cert-manager health: certificate status, controller performance, ACME operations, webhook health, work queue, and resource usage. Scrape cert-manager port 9402 via OTel Collector Prometheus receiver.

display.name: namespace
display.description: Kubernetes namespace of the certificates

display.name: issuer_name
display.description: Certificate issuer name

display.name: deployment_environment
display.description: Deployment environment

display.name: Total Certificates
display.description: Total certificates tracked by cert-manager. Sum of ready_status across all condition values equals total cert count (exactly one condition = 1 per cert).

display.name: ACME Error Rate (non-2xx) by Action
display.description: Rate of ACME requests returning non-2xx HTTP status codes per action. Persistent errors indicate ACME provider issues.

display.name: ACME Average Request Duration by Action
display.description: Average ACME HTTP request duration per action. Computed from Summary .sum / .count rate.

display.name: Webhook Request Rate by Status Code
display.description: Rate of admission webhook requests grouped by HTTP response status code.

display.name: Webhook Average Admission Latency
display.description: Average admission webhook processing latency computed from histogram .sum / .count rates.

display.name: Work Queue Depth by Controller
display.description: Current item count in each controller work queue. Growing depth indicates processing backlog.

display.name: Work Queue Add Rate by Controller
display.description: Rate of items enqueued per controller queue per second.

display.name: CPU Usage by Component
display.description: CPU core utilization rate per cert-manager component (controller, webhook, cainjector).

display.name: Memory Usage by Component
display.description: Resident set size (RSS) memory per cert-manager component in bytes.

display.name: Ready Certificates
display.description: Certificates currently in Ready condition (actively serving TLS).

filter.expression: (condition = 'True' AND namespace IN $namespace AND issuer_name IN $issuer_name)

display.name: Not Ready Certificates
display.description: Certificates with condition=False. Non-zero indicates issuance or renewal failure.

filter.expression: (condition = 'False' AND namespace IN $namespace AND issuer_name IN $issuer_name)

display.name: Webhook Requests In-Flight
display.description: Current number of admission requests being processed by the cert-manager webhook.

display.name: Certificate Ready Status per Cert
display.description: Ready condition value per certificate over time (1=ready, 0=not ready). Drops indicate issuance or renewal failures.

filter.expression: (condition = 'True' AND namespace IN $namespace AND issuer_name IN $issuer_name)

display.name: Not Ready Certificates by Namespace
display.description: Count of not-ready certificates grouped by namespace. Growing values indicate systemic issuance problems.

display.name: Controller Sync Call Rate
display.description: Rate of sync() calls per controller per second. Spikes may indicate high reconciliation load.

display.name: Controller Sync Error Rate
display.description: Rate of sync() errors per controller per second. Sustained errors indicate reconciliation problems.

display.name: ACME Request Rate by Action
display.description: Rate of outbound ACME HTTP requests per action (getNonce, createOrder, finalizeOrder, etc.).
